content.full_text:
Assembly California Legislature

WADIE P. DEDDEH
ASSEMBLYMAN, SAN DIEGO COUNTY, EIGHTIETH DISTRICT
Chairman
ASSEMBLY COMMITTEE ON PUBLIC EMPLOYEES AND RETIREMENT

May 17, 1976

Ms. Regina Siciliano Kutchins,
Technical Assistant Program Coordinator
Fair Political Practices Commission
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, California 95814

Dear Regina:

This is to confirm our conversation today regarding the mailing of dinner invitations for a fundraising dinner.

My understanding of the information you received from Fair Political Practices Commission Legal Counsel was that the mailing of campaign fund solicitations to a lobbyist's principal by name was not in violation of the law, even if the address for the principal was the same as for the lobbyist, as long as the principal's name and address was obtained from the official filing of that information with the Secretary of State's office.

Please inform me if in any aspect my understanding of our conversation is in error.

Very truly yours,

Garret Edmunds

GE:fs
